user.title: Birmingham Water Works Board
user.description: Enter your BWWB portal credentials and the URL of your Playwright auth sidecar service.

data_description.auth_service_url: URL of the utility-auth-service running on your local machine (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:18792/bwwb/data)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the BWWB sidecar service. Verify the Auth Sidecar URL is correct and the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please verify your credentials at web.bwwb.org.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: Birmingham Water Works Board is already configured.
